generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring of temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring of lighting conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring of occupancy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance SensorDataStreamTemperature : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance SensorDataStreamLighting : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance SensorDataStreamOccupancy : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based models containing geometric, spatial, and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTool
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata for Hono/Ditto integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance ControlLogicSpecification : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control logic specifications for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService, VisualComfortManagementService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance planning and energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePlanningInsight, EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHVACAction, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance VisualComfortManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management using lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualModelInsight
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance planning"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy efficiency"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data insights"
]

instance VisualModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization model insights"
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust HVAC system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust lighting control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for lighting control within BCS"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for HVAC control within BCS"
]

instance LivingLabFacility : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in the AECO domain, specifically a Living Lab facility"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightingSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators, such as lighting intensity or HVAC settings, based on simulation and optimization results."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components for continuous data exchange and response."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with BIM as semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; synchronization techniques to prevent semantic drift between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange (specific protocols not detailed in document)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with IoT platforms via Hono/Ditto and semantic interoperability across BIM-based systems and external data sources."
]
